name: Lemon Beef Oriental
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin Butt Steak, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 lb Fresh snow peas (Chinese pea pods)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook hot, cooked rice.
2. Heat oil with salt in wok or heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Stir-fry steak pieces until browned. Sprinkle with lemon peel.
4. Add broth, peas, and mushrooms. Stir-fry 1 minute longer.
5. Combine lemon juice with cornstarch. Add to beef and cook until thickened and bubbly.
6. Stir in ginger.
7. Serve with hot, cooked rice. Makes 4-5 servings.
